ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector in which the company operates */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization */,
  "sec_filings" TEXT /* URL to the SEC filings for the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "hq_address" TEXT /* Headquarters address of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the company */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* 52-week low price of the stock */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* 52-week high price of the stock */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric record */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the company */,
  "price_earnings" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "earnings_per_share" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "price_sales" REAL /* Price-to-sales ratio */,
  "price_book" REAL /* Price-to-book ratio */,
  "return_on_equity" REAL /* Return on equity */,
  "debt_to_equity" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio */,
  "current_ratio" REAL /* Current ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_tier" TEXT /* Subscription tier of the user */,
  "portfolio_value" REAL /* Value of the user's investment portfolio */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the company */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the company data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, analyze) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES companies ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the company */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, news) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES companies ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the company */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES companies ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the company */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stocks owned */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was purchased */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "gain_loss" REAL /* Gain or loss on the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES companies ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription plan */,
  "subscription_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subscription plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the subscription plan */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features included in the subscription plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscription_history" (
  "subscription_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_history_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
